analysis.construction_strategy: Extrude a 90x45 rectangle to an unspecified height. Sketch a triangular profile on an internal plane and extrude it with a thickness of 5mm to create the rib.
analysis.overall_shape: A rectangular block or enclosure containing a single internal triangular reinforcement rib.
analysis.title: RIBS - VARIANT 3

uncertainties.description: The height (Z-axis) of the main body and the rib is not specified in the drawing.
The exact horizontal offset (X-coordinate) for the rib placement is not dimensioned.
The base length and height of the triangular rib profile are not explicitly dimensioned.
The drawing mentions 'SOLID PART FOR 3D PRINTING', but it is unclear if the rectangle is a hollow shell or a solid block.

views.description: Plan view showing the main rectangular body and a single triangular rib
